current_facts.statement: Rust implements the frontend, HIR, MIR and xVM; Deeplus MIR is semantic authority; LLVM AOT precedes ORC JIT.
All 15 product lanes remain NOT_RUN; static publication closure and Rust scaffold buildability are not product evidence.
M1.3 is an internal publication revision over the M1.2 authority source snapshot; merge, tag, GitHub Release, public terms, and product promotion are separate gates.
Non-authoritative projection; resolve the normative clause by authority path and digest.

open_actions.acceptance_test: Invalid pointer and mutation cases fail with their designated codes after manifest refresh; valid current passes.

open_actions.summary: Define and verify the first product E3 receipt without promoting unrelated lanes.
open_actions.acceptance_test: Representative programmer-intent matrix runs and only evidenced lanes change from NOT_RUN.

watch_items.statement: Legacy filenames inside imported row provenance resolve through migration/path-aliases.json and never become new edit authorities.
A reviewed PR head, a synthetic merge SHA, an authority source commit, and a preserved Library object are distinct identity types.
